_provenance.determinism: byte-identical across two full sweeps in one session
_provenance.steadyState: transitions left ENABLED (freezing would alter captured transition-* channels); paint channels polled to stability across every stage element, bounded 600ms

interactionDrivers.formStateReset: after every interaction capture, native input state mutated by the interaction itself (a click on an uncontrolled radio/checkbox checks it) is reset to mount defaults — interaction-caused form state never leaks across captures
interactionDrivers.hover: playwright locator.hover({force:true}) — pointer to element center
interactionDrivers.focus-visible: sentinel.focus() + keyboard Tab (keyboard modality; matched state recorded per capture)
interactionDrivers.active: hover + mouse.down (held during capture) — honestly hover+active, what a user sees mid-press

_provenance.enumerationPolicy: full-cartesian (6 combos; cartesian 6 vs limit 512); enumeration-policy: full cartesian (6 ≤ 512)
